parameters.query: DELETE FROM opportunity_alerts WHERE due_date IS NOT NULL AND due_date < NOW();

INSERT INTO opportunity_alerts (solicitation_number, name, opportunity_type, set_aside_type, posted_date, due_date, agency, naics_code, source_url, fit_score, capability_matches, source, govtribe_id, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.solicitation_number }}', '{{ $json.name }}', '{{ $json.opportunity_type }}', '{{ $json.set_aside_type }}', {{ $json.posted_date ? "'" + $json.posted_date + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.due_date ? "'" + $json.due_date + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.agency }}', '{{ $json.naics_code }}', '{{ $json.source_url }}', {{ $json.fit_score }}, '{{ $json.capability_matches }}', '{{ $json.source }}', '{{ $json.govtribe_id }}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (solicitation_number) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, fit_score = EXCLUDED.fit_score, capability_matches = EXCLUDED.capability_matches, due_date = EXCLUDED.due_date, updated_at = NOW();
DELETE FROM opportunity_alerts WHERE due_date IS NOT NULL AND due_date < NOW(); SELECT 'cleanup_done' AS status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM opportunity_alerts) AS remaining;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN fit_score >= 50 THEN 1 END) as high_fit, COUNT(CASE WHEN due_date > NOW() THEN 1 END) as open_opps, COUNT(CASE WHEN source = 'govtribe' THEN 1 END) as govtribe_count FROM opportunity_alerts;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS opportunity_alerts (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, solicitation_number VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL, name TEXT, opportunity_type VARCHAR(50), set_aside_type VARCHAR(100), posted_date TIMESTAMPTZ, due_date TIMESTAMPTZ, agency TEXT, naics_code VARCHAR(20), source_url TEXT, fit_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0, capability_matches TEXT, source VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'govtribe', govtribe_id VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_opp_sol ON opportunity_alerts(solicitation_number); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_opp_score ON opportunity_alerts(fit_score DESC); SELECT 'table_ready' AS status;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid action. Use: ingest, cleanup, status, setup, govtribe' }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO opportunity_alerts (solicitation_number, name, opportunity_type, set_aside_type, posted_date, due_date, agency, naics_code, source_url, fit_score, capability_matches, source, govtribe_id, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.solicitation_number }}', '{{ $json.name }}', '{{ $json.opportunity_type }}', '{{ $json.set_aside_type }}', {{ $json.posted_date ? "'" + $json.posted_date + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.due_date ? "'" + $json.due_date + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.agency }}', '{{ $json.naics_code }}', '{{ $json.source_url }}', {{ $json.fit_score }}, '{{ $json.capability_matches }}', '{{ $json.source }}', '{{ $json.govtribe_id }}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (solicitation_number) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, fit_score = GREATEST(EXCLUDED.fit_score, opportunity_alerts.fit_score), capability_matches = EXCLUDED.capability_matches, due_date = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.due_date, opportunity_alerts.due_date), source_url = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.source_url, opportunity_alerts.source_url), govtribe_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.govtribe_id, opportunity_alerts.govtribe_id), updated_at = NOW();

parameters.name: postedFrom
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(Date.now() - 90*24*60*60*1000); return (d.getMonth()+1).toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + d.getDate().toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + d.getFullYear(); })() }}

parameters.name: postedTo
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(); return (d.getMonth()+1).toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + d.getDate().toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + d.getFullYear(); })() }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO opportunity_alerts (solicitation_number, name, opportunity_type, set_aside_type, posted_date, due_date, agency, naics_code, source_url, fit_score, capability_matches, source, govtribe_id, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ ($json.solicitation_number || "").substring(0,255) }}', '{{ ($json.name || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0,500) }}', '{{ $json.opportunity_type || "" }}', '{{ $json.set_aside_type || "" }}', NULLIF('{{ $json.posted_date || "" }}','')::timestamptz, NULLIF('{{ $json.due_date || "" }}','')::timestamptz, '{{ ($json.agency || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0,500) }}', '{{ $json.naics_code || "" }}', '{{ $json.source_url || "" }}', {{ $json.gda_score || 0 }}, '{{ ($json.description || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0,500) }}', '{{ $json.source || "SAM.gov" }}', '{{ $json.govtribe_id || "" }}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (solicitation_number) DO UPDATE SET name=EXCLUDED.name, opportunity_type=EXCLUDED.opportunity_type, set_aside_type=EXCLUDED.set_aside_type, due_date=COALESCE(EXCLUDED.due_date, opportunity_alerts.due_date), agency=EXCLUDED.agency, fit_score=GREATEST(EXCLUDED.fit_score, opportunity_alerts.fit_score), capability_matches=EXCLUDED.capability_matches, source_url=COALESCE(EXCLUDED.source_url, opportunity_alerts.source_url), updated_at=NOW() RETURNING solicitation_number, fit_score

SELECT id, agency, dept, level_1, level_2, level_3, opp_title, naics_code, set_aside, estimated_value, response_deadline::text as due_date, data_source, solicitation_number, govtribe_id, source_url, place_of_performance, ai_analysis FROM gda_opportunity_tracker ORDER BY id

UPDATE gda_opportunity_tracker SET gda_score = {{ $json.gda_score }}, gda_label = '{{ $json.gda_label }}', eis_fit_score = {{ $json.gda_score }}, incumbent_analysis = '{{ ($json.incumbent_analysis || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', likely_competitors = '{{ ($json.likely_competitors || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', eligible_vehicles = '{{ ($json.eligible_vehicles || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' WHERE id = {{ $json.id }}
SELECT id, solicitation_number, opp_title, estimated_value, response_deadline FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE solicitation_number IS NOT NULL AND solicitation_number != '' LIMIT 5000
